response.justification: Bogdan brings nearly 20 years of broad software engineering experience and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which is a genuine positive signal. However, the role is a director-level principal requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI product platforms at scale, and strategic customer advisory experience. His AI involvement is recent and implementation-level rather than strategic or research-grounded. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no evidence of cloud platform architecture at enterprise scale, and no demonstrated track record of advising strategic customers or shaping organizational AI direction — all of which are central to this position.
strengths: Nearly 20 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators, showing genuine recent engagement with the agentic AI ecosystem
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective and early-stage company contributions aligns with the preferred intrapreneurial/startup experience profile
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; education is a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts degree, well below the preferred Master's/PhD bar for this role
AI experience is recent, narrow, and tooling-level — lacking the depth, published work, or demonstrated AI products at scale that 'recognized expertise' implies
No evidence of director-level scope: no strategic customer advisory work, no cross-organizational AI strategy ownership, and no cloud platform leadership at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Absence of strategic AI depth and recognized expertise
No director-level or customer advisory leadership experience
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq
